results.rendered_html:
ślakṣṇa a. [śliṣ-ksna ni˚  Uṇ. 3. 19 ]
1 Soft, gentle, mild, bland (as words &c.);  Ms. 8. 396. 
2 Smooth, polished;  Śi. 3. 46. 
3 Small, fine, thin, delicate.
4 Beautiful, charming.
5 Candid, honest, frank.
